content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "週末的興趣",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你週末常常做什麼休閒活動？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ zhōumò chángcháng zuò shénme xiūxián huódòng?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 zhou1mo4 chang2chang2 zuo4 shen2me xiu1xian2 huo2dong4?",
          "translation_en": "What leisure activities do you often do on weekends?",
          "translation_ko": "주말에 주로 어떤 여가 활동을 하세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我喜歡爬山和騎腳踏車，有時候也會看小說。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ xǐhuān páshān hé qí jiǎotàchē, yǒu shíhou yě huì kàn xiǎoshuō.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 xi3huan1 pa2shan1 he2 qi2 jiao3ta4che1, you3 shi2hou ye3 hui4 kan4 xiao3shuo1.",
          "translation_en": "I like hiking and cycling, and sometimes I also read novels.",
          "translation_ko": "저는 등산과 자전거 타기를 좋아하고, 가끔 소설도 봐요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "聽起來很好玩！你常常去哪裡爬山？",
          "pinyin": "Tīng qǐlái hěn hǎowán! Nǐ chángcháng qù nǎlǐ páshān?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ting1 qi3lai2 hen3 hao3wan2! Ni3 chang2chang2 qu4 na3li3 pa2shan1?",
          "translation_en": "Sounds fun! Where do you often go hiking?",
          "translation_ko": "재미있어 보이네요! 주로 어디로 등산 가세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我最近很喜歡去台北附近的山，風景很漂亮。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ zuìjìn hěn xǐhuān qù Táiběi fùjìn de shān, fēngjǐng hěn piàoliang.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 zui4jin4 hen3 xi3huan1 qu4 Tai2bei3 fu4jin4 de shan1, feng1jing3 hen3 piao4liang.",
          "translation_en": "Lately I really like going to the mountains near Taipei; the scenery is beautiful.",
          "translation_ko": "요즘에는 타이베이 근처 산에 가는 걸 좋아해요. 경치가 아주 예뻐요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "那下次可以一起去嗎？我也想試試看。",
          "pinyin": "Nà xiàcì kěyǐ yīqǐ qù ma? Wǒ yě xiǎng shì shì kàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Na4 xia4ci4 ke3yi3 yi1qi3 qu4 ma? Wo3 ye3 xiang3 shi4 shi4 kan4.",
          "translation_en": "Then can we go together next time? I also want to give it a try.",
          "translation_ko": "그럼 다음에 같이 가도 될까요? 저도 한번 해보고 싶어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "當然可以！我們可以約這個週末，你有空嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Dāngrán kěyǐ! Wǒmen kěyǐ yuē zhège zhōumò, nǐ yǒu kòng ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Dang1ran2 ke3yi3! Wo3men ke3yi3 yue1 zhe4ge zhou1mo4, ni3 you3 kong4 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Of course! We can plan for this weekend. Are you free?",
          "translation_ko": "물론이죠! 이번 주말에 약속할 수 있어요. 시간 괜찮으세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "這個週末我有空，我們約好了！",
          "pinyin": "Zhège zhōumò wǒ yǒu kòng, wǒmen yuē hǎo le!",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Zhe4ge zhou1mo4 wo3 you3 kong4, wo3men yue1 hao3 le!",
          "translation_en": "I'm free this weekend. It's settled!",
          "translation_ko": "이번 주말에 시간 돼요. 약속 잡았네요!"
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What does B like to do on weekends?",
          "question_ko": "B는 주말에 무엇을 좋아합니까?",
          "options_en": ["Hiking and cycling", "Watching movies", "Playing basketball"],
          "options_ko": ["등산과 자전거 타기", "영화 보기", "농구하기"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on tone and rhythm.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Tell about your weekend hobbies using words like 常常, 有時候, 喜歡."
    },
    {
      "title": "運動愛好",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你平時喜歡做什麼運動？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ píngshí xǐhuān zuò shénme yùndòng?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 ping2shi2 xi3huan1 zuo4 shen2me yun4dong4?",
          "translation_en": "What sports do you usually like to do?",
          "translation_ko": "평소에 어떤 운동을 좋아하세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我喜歡打籃球和踢足球，每個週末都會和朋友一起玩。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ xǐhuān dǎ lánqiú hé tī zúqiú, měi ge zhōumò dōu huì hé péngyou yīqǐ wán.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 xi3huan1 da3 lan2qiu2 he2 ti1 zu2qiu2, mei3 ge zhou1mo4 dou1 hui4 he2 peng2you yi1qi3 wan2.",
          "translation_en": "I like playing basketball and soccer; every weekend I play with friends.",
          "translation_ko": "저는 농구와 축구를 좋아해요. 매주 주말마다 친구들과 같이 해요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "好厲害！你打籃球多久了？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo lìhài! Nǐ dǎ lánqiú duō jiǔ le?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 li4hai4! Ni3 da3 lan2qiu2 duo1 jiu3 le?",
          "translation_en": "Awesome! How long have you been playing basketball?",
          "translation_ko": "대단하네요! 농구를 얼마나 하셨어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我從高中開始打籃球，已經好幾年了。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ cóng gāozhōng kāishǐ dǎ lánqiú, yǐjīng hǎo jǐ nián le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 cong2 gao1zhong1 kai1shi3 da3 lan2qiu2, yi3jing1 hao3 ji3 nian2 le.",
          "translation_en": "I started playing basketball in high school; it's been several years already.",
          "translation_ko": "고등학교 때부터 농구를 시작해서 벌써 몇 년 됐어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "我也想學打籃球，你可以教我嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ yě xiǎng xué dǎ lánqiú, nǐ kěyǐ jiāo wǒ ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 ye3 xiang3 xue2 da3 lan2qiu2, ni3 ke3yi3 jiao1 wo3 ma?",
          "translation_en": "I also want to learn basketball; can you teach me?",
          "translation_ko": "저도 농구를 배우고 싶은데, 가르쳐 주실 수 있나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "沒問題！這個週末我們可以一起去打球。",
          "pinyin": "Méi wèntí! Zhège zhōumò wǒmen kěyǐ yīqǐ qù dǎ qiú.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Mei2 wen4ti2! Zhe4ge zhou1mo4 wo3men ke3yi3 yi1qi3 qu4 da3 qiu2.",
          "translation_en": "No problem! We can go play together this weekend.",
          "translation_ko": "문제없어요! 이번 주말에 같이 하러 가요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What sports does B like?",
          "question_ko": "B는 어떤 운동을 좋아합니까?",
          "options_en": ["Basketball and soccer", "Tennis and badminton", "Swimming and running"],
          "options_ko": ["농구와 축구", "테니스와 배드민턴", "수영과 달리기"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on tone and rhythm.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Tell about a sport you like and how often you play it."
    },
    {
      "title": "看電影",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你放假的時候喜歡做什麼？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ fàngjià de shíhou xǐhuān zuò shénme?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 fang4jia4 de shi2hou xi3huan1 zuo4 shen2me?",
          "translation_en": "What do you like to do during your holidays?",
          "translation_ko": "휴가 때 무엇을 하기를 좋아하세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我喜歡看電影，有時候也會看演唱會。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ xǐhuān kàn diànyǐng, yǒu shíhou yě huì kàn yǎnchànghuì.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 xi3huan1 kan4 dian4ying3, you3 shi2hou ye3 hui4 kan4 yan3chang4hui4.",
          "translation_en": "I like watching movies, and sometimes I also go to concerts.",
          "translation_ko": "저는 영화 보는 걸 좋아하고, 가끔 콘서트도 가요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你最近看了什麼好看的電影嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ zuìjìn kàn le shénme hǎokàn de diànyǐng ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 zui4jin4 kan4 le shen2me hao3kan4 de dian4ying3 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Have you watched any good movies recently?",
          "translation_ko": "최근에 본 좋은 영화가 있나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我上個禮拜看了一部很有意思的電影，推薦你也去看看。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ shàng ge lǐbài kàn le yī bù hěn yǒu yìsi de diànyǐng, tuījiàn nǐ yě qù kàn kàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 shang4 ge li3bai4 kan4 le yi1 bu4 hen3 you3 yi4si de dian4ying3, tui1jian4 ni3 ye3 qu4 kan4 kan4.",
          "translation_en": "Last week I watched a very interesting movie; I recommend you go see it too.",
          "translation_ko": "지난주에 아주 재미있는 영화를 봤어요. 추천하니까 한번 보세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "好啊！我們可以約這個週末一起去看電影。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo a! Wǒmen kěyǐ yuē zhège zhōumò yīqǐ qù kàn diànyǐng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 a! Wo3men ke3yi3 yue1 zhe4ge zhou1mo4 yi1qi3 qu4 kan4 dian4ying3.",
          "translation_en": "Great! We can plan to go watch a movie together this weekend.",
          "translation_ko": "좋아요! 이번 주말에 같이 영화 보러 가기로 해요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "沒問題，我們到時候見！",
          "pinyin": "Méi wèntí, wǒmen dào shíhou jiàn!",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Mei2 wen4ti2, wo3men dao4 shi2hou jian4!",
          "translation_en": "No problem, see you then!",
          "translation_ko": "문제없어요, 그때 봐요!"
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What does B like to do during holidays?",
          "question_ko": "B는 휴가 때 무엇을 좋아합니까?",
          "options_en": ["Watch movies and concerts", "Play basketball", "Go hiking"],
          "options_ko": ["영화와 콘서트 보기", "농구하기", "등산 가기"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on tone and rhythm.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Tell about a movie you watched recently and whether you liked it."
    }
  ]
}
